mapper.sql: select id, owner_id, owner_name, praise_type, praise_content, praise_target, status, reply_content, reply_time, community_id, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, remark from community_property_praise
mapper.select: select id, owner_id, owner_name, praise_type, praise_target, status, content, create_time, update_time, remark from community_property_praise where id = #{id}
mapper.update: update community_property_praise set owner_id = #{ownerId}, owner_name = #{ownerName}, praise_type = #{praiseType}, praise_content = #{praiseContent}, praise_target = #{praiseTarget}, status = #{status}, reply_content = #{replyContent}, reply_time = #{replyTime}, community_id = #{communityId}, create_by = #{createBy}, create_time = #{createTime}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = #{updateTime}, remark = #{remark} where id = #{id}
mapper.delete: -- delete from community_property_praise where id = #{id} DELETE FROM community_property_praise WHERE id IN (${ids})
